violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2024

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was less than 100 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for quaternary ammonium sanitizer is 200 ppm. Sani bucket was emptied and refilled to proper concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026

The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2024
Per PIC, dish machine is not pulling detergent. Work order is in place. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025

The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2024
The automatic dispenser for the quaternary ammonium is dispensing at a concentration higher than 400 ppm. PIC diluted to proper concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2024
Two door freezer located in the kitchen area was not in good repair, nonfunctional at time of inspection. Freezer must be repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023
The toilet in the bathroom area is in poor repair, dripping from the flush mechanism. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023
